prereviewsOf.description: Title of the page that shows the PREreviews for a preprint.

preprintDetails.description: Heading for details of a preprint, such as its title and abstract.

abstractHeading.description: Heading for the abstract of a preprint.

posted.description: Label for the date a preprint was posted.

server.description: Label for the preprint server where the preprint is published.

itemId.description: Label for the unique identifier of a preprint on PhilSci-Archive.

readPreprint.description: Button to read the preprint on the preprint server.

prereviews.description: Heading for the section showing the PREreviews for the preprint.

writeAPrereview.description: Button to write a PREreview for the preprint.

requestAPrereview.description: Button to request a PREreview for the preprint.

prereviewByOneAuthor.description: Heading for a PREreview by a single author.

prereviewByOneAuthorInClub.description: Heading for a PREreview by a single author in a Club.

prereviewByMultipleAuthors.description: Heading for a PREreview by multiple authors.

prereviewByMultipleAuthorsInClub.description: Heading for a PREreview by multiple authors in a Club.

otherAuthors.message: {number, plural, one {# other author} other {# other authors}}
otherAuthors.description: Text for the entry in the author list indicating the number of anonymous authors.

authoredBy.description: Text for a PREreview showing its authors.

authoredByInClub.description: Text for a PREreview showing its authors and Club.

readPrereviewByOneAuthor.description: Link to read a PREreview by a single author.

readPrereviewByOneAuthorInClub.description: Link to read a PREreview by a single author in a Club.

readPrereviewByMultipleAuthors.description: Link to read a PREreview by multiple authors.

readPrereviewByMultipleAuthorsInClub.message: Read <visuallyHidden>the PREreview by {author} et al. of {club}</visuallyHidden>
readPrereviewByMultipleAuthorsInClub.description: Link to read a PREreview by multiple authors in a Club.

rapidPrereviews.message: {number, plural, one {# Rapid PREreview} other {# Rapid PREreviews}}
rapidPrereviews.description: Heading for the section showing the Rapid PREreviews for the preprint.

whereCanRapidPrereview.message: Where can I fill out a Rapid PREreview?
whereCanRapidPrereview.description: Heading for the section explaining where to fill out a Rapid PREreview for a preprint.

rapidReplacedWith.message: We’ve recently replaced Rapid PREreviews with <link>Structured PREreviews</link>.
rapidReplacedWith.description: Text shown alongside the heading “Where can I fill out a Rapid PREreview?” to explain that Rapid PREreviews have been replaced.

writeStructuredPrereview.message: You can <link>write a Structured PREreview</link> now.
writeStructuredPrereview.description: Text shown alongside the heading “Where can I fill out a Rapid PREreview?” to explain that Structured PREreviews are now available.

updatingRapidPrereviews.message: We’ll be updating older Rapid PREreviews like these soon.
updatingRapidPrereviews.description: Text shown alongside the heading “Where can I fill out a Rapid PREreview?” to explain that older Rapid PREreviews will be updated.

aggregatedRapidPreviews.description: Heading for the section showing the aggregated Rapid PREreviews for the preprint.

question.description: Label for the questions in a Rapid PREreview.

yes.description: Answer to a question in a Rapid PREreview where the answer is affirmative.

unsure.description: Answer to a question in a Rapid PREreview where the answer is uncertain.

na.description: Answer to a question in a Rapid PREreview where the answer is not applicable.

no.description: Answer to a question in a Rapid PREreview where the answer is negative.

rapidAvailableCode.message: Is the code used in the manuscript available?
rapidAvailableCode.description: Question in a Rapid PREreview asking whether the code used in the manuscript is available.

rapidAvailableData.message: Are the data used in the manuscript available?
rapidAvailableData.description: Question in a Rapid PREreview asking whether the data used in the manuscript are available.

rapidCoherent.message: Are the principal conclusions supported by the data and analysis?
rapidCoherent.description: Question in a Rapid PREreview asking whether the principal conclusions are supported by the data and analysis.

rapidEthics.message: Have the authors adequately discussed ethical concerns?
rapidEthics.description: Question in a Rapid PREreview asking whether the authors have adequately discussed ethical concerns.

rapidFuture.message: Are the results likely to lead to future research?
rapidFuture.description: Question in a Rapid PREreview asking whether the results are likely to lead to future research.

rapidLimitations.description: Question in a Rapid PREreview asking whether the manuscript discusses limitations.

rapidMethods.message: Are the methods and statistics appropriate for the analysis?
rapidMethods.description: Question in a Rapid PREreview asking whether the methods and statistics are appropriate for the analysis.

rapidNewData.message: Does the manuscript include new data?
rapidNewData.description: Question in a Rapid PREreview asking whether the manuscript includes new data.

rapidNovel.description: Question in a Rapid PREreview asking whether the findings are novel.

rapidPeerReview.message: Do you recommend this manuscript for peer review?
rapidPeerReview.description: Question in a Rapid PREreview asking whether the reviewer recommends the manuscript for peer review.

rapidRecommend.message: Would you recommend this manuscript to others?
rapidRecommend.description: Question in a Rapid PREreview asking whether the reviewer would recommend the manuscript to others.

rapidReproducibility.message: Is sufficient detail provided to allow reproduction of the study?
rapidReproducibility.description: Question in a Rapid PREreview asking whether sufficient detail is provided to allow reproduction of the study.

havingProblems.description: Heading of the page that is shown when there is a problem showing the preprint and its PREreviews.

unableToShow.message: We’re unable to show the preprint and its PREreviews now.
unableToShow.description: Text shown alongside the heading “Sorry, we’re having problems”.

tryAgainLater.description: Text shown alongside the heading “Sorry, we’re having problems”.
